targetTranslation: he came (past tense verb at start of أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْإِنسٰنِ - came upon mankind)
ayahArabic: هَلْ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْإِنسٰنِ حِينٌ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهْرِ لَمْ يَكُن شَيْـًٔا مَّذْكُورًا
ayahEnglish: Has there [not] come upon man a period of time when he was not a thing [even] mentioned?

ayahArabic: هَلْ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْإِنسٰنِ حِينٌ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهْرِ لَمْ يَكُن شَيْـًٔا مَّذْكُورًا
ayahEnglish: Has there [not] come upon man a period of time when he was not a thing [even] mentioned?

targetTranslation: he is (in negative context with لَمْ)
ayahArabic: هَلْ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْإِنسٰنِ حِينٌ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهْرِ لَمْ يَكُن شَيْـًٔا مَّذْكُورًا
ayahEnglish: Has there [not] come upon man a period of time when he was not a thing [even] mentioned?

ayahArabic: هَلْ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْإِنسٰنِ حِينٌ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهْرِ لَمْ يَكُن شَيْـًٔا مَّذْكُورًا
ayahEnglish: Has there [not] come upon man a period of time when he was not a thing [even] mentioned?

ayahArabic: هَلْ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْإِنسٰنِ حِينٌ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهْرِ لَمْ يَكُن شَيْـًٔا مَّذْكُورًا
ayahEnglish: Has there [not] come upon man a period of time when he was not a thing [even] mentioned?

ayahArabic: إِنَّا خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسٰنَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ أَمْشَاجٍ نَّبْتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلْنٰهُ سَمِيعًۢا بَصِيرًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We created man from a sperm-drop mixture that We may try him; and We made him hearing and seeing.

targetTranslation: a drop (of mixed fluids from which humans are created)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسٰنَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ أَمْشَاجٍ نَّبْتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلْنٰهُ سَمِيعًۢا بَصِيرًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We created man from a sperm-drop mixture that We may try him; and We made him hearing and seeing.

ayahArabic: إِنَّا خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسٰنَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ أَمْشَاجٍ نَّبْتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلْنٰهُ سَمِيعًۢا بَصِيرًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We created man from a sperm-drop mixture that We may try him; and We made him hearing and seeing.

targetTranslation: we are testing him (object of خَلَقْنَا)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسٰنَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ أَمْشَاجٍ نَّبْتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلْنٰهُ سَمِيعًۢا بَصِيرًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We created man from a sperm-drop mixture that We may try him; and We made him hearing and seeing.

ayahArabic: إِنَّا خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسٰنَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ أَمْشَاجٍ نَّبْتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلْنٰهُ سَمِيعًۢا بَصِيرًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We created man from a sperm-drop mixture that We may try him; and We made him hearing and seeing.

ayahArabic: إِنَّا خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسٰنَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ أَمْشَاجٍ نَّبْتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلْنٰهُ سَمِيعًۢا بَصِيرًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We created man from a sperm-drop mixture that We may try him; and We made him hearing and seeing.

targetTranslation: we guided him (object of السَّبِيلَ/the way)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا هَدَيْنٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We guided him to the way, be he grateful or be he ungrateful.

ayahArabic: إِنَّا هَدَيْنٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We guided him to the way, be he grateful or be he ungrateful.

ayahArabic: إِنَّا هَدَيْنٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We guided him to the way, be he grateful or be he ungrateful.

targetTranslation: we have prepared (for الْكٰفِرِينَ - the disbelievers)
ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَعْتَدْنَا لِلْكٰفِرِينَ سَلٰسِلَا۟ وَأَغْلٰلًا وَسَعِيرًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We have prepared for the disbelievers chains and shackles and a blaze.

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَعْتَدْنَا لِلْكٰفِرِينَ سَلٰسِلَا۟ وَأَغْلٰلًا وَسَعِيرًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We have prepared for the disbelievers chains and shackles and a blaze.

targetTranslation: they drink (referring to the righteous ones mentioned as الْأَبْرَارَ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ يَشْرَبُونَ مِن كَأْسٍ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the righteous will drink from a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of Kāfūr,

targetTranslation: a cup (that is being described by كَافُورًا)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ يَشْرَبُونَ مِن كَأْسٍ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the righteous will drink from a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of Kāfūr,

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ يَشْرَبُونَ مِن كَأْسٍ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the righteous will drink from a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of Kāfūr,

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ يَشْرَبُونَ مِن كَأْسٍ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the righteous will drink from a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of Kāfūr,

targetTranslation: camphor (as the substance mixed in their drink)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ يَشْرَبُونَ مِن كَأْسٍ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the righteous will drink from a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of Kāfūr,

targetTranslation: a spring (that the servants of Allah drink from)
ayahArabic: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًا
ayahEnglish: A spring of which the [righteous] servants of Allāh will drink; they will make it gush forth in force [and abundance].

ayahArabic: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًا
ayahEnglish: A spring of which the [righteous] servants of Allāh will drink; they will make it gush forth in force [and abundance].

targetTranslation: servants/worshippers (subject of يُفَجِّرُونَهَا - they make it gush forth)
ayahArabic: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًا
ayahEnglish: A spring of which the [righteous] servants of Allāh will drink; they will make it gush forth in force [and abundance].

ayahArabic: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًا
ayahEnglish: A spring of which the [righteous] servants of Allāh will drink; they will make it gush forth in force [and abundance].

targetTranslation: they make it burst forth forcefully (referring to عَيْنًا - the spring)
ayahArabic: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًا
ayahEnglish: A spring of which the [righteous] servants of Allāh will drink; they will make it gush forth in force [and abundance].

targetTranslation: causing to burst forth abundantly (object of يُفَجِّرُونَهَا)
ayahArabic: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًا
ayahEnglish: A spring of which the [righteous] servants of Allāh will drink; they will make it gush forth in force [and abundance].

targetTranslation: they fulfill (subject of يَخَافُونَ - they fear)
ayahArabic: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذْرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوْمًا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسْتَطِيرًا
ayahEnglish: They [are those who] fulfill [their] vows and fear a Day whose evil will be widespread.

ayahArabic: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذْرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوْمًا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسْتَطِيرًا
ayahEnglish: They [are those who] fulfill [their] vows and fear a Day whose evil will be widespread.

ayahArabic: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذْرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوْمًا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسْتَطِيرًا
ayahEnglish: They [are those who] fulfill [their] vows and fear a Day whose evil will be widespread.

ayahArabic: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذْرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوْمًا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسْتَطِيرًا
ayahEnglish: They [are those who] fulfill [their] vows and fear a Day whose evil will be widespread.

targetTranslation: spreading widely (describing شَرُّ/evil in the ayah)
ayahArabic: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذْرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوْمًا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسْتَطِيرًا
ayahEnglish: They [are those who] fulfill [their] vows and fear a Day whose evil will be widespread.

targetTranslation: his love (referring to giving food despite loving it)
ayahArabic: وَيُطْعِمُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِۦ مِسْكِينًا وَيَتِيمًا وَأَسِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And they give food in spite of love for it to the needy, the orphan, and the captive,

targetTranslation: a poor person (object of يُطْعِمُونَ - they feed)
ayahArabic: وَيُطْعِمُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِۦ مِسْكِينًا وَيَتِيمًا وَأَسِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And they give food in spite of love for it to the needy, the orphan, and the captive,

targetTranslation: we feed you all (object of لَا نُرِيدُ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّمَا نُطْعِمُكُمْ لِوَجْهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَآءً وَلَا شُكُورًا
ayahEnglish: [Saying], "We feed you only for the face [i.e., approval] of Allāh. We wish not from you reward or gratitude.

ayahArabic: إِنَّمَا نُطْعِمُكُمْ لِوَجْهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَآءً وَلَا شُكُورًا
ayahEnglish: [Saying], "We feed you only for the face [i.e., approval] of Allāh. We wish not from you reward or gratitude.

ayahArabic: إِنَّمَا نُطْعِمُكُمْ لِوَجْهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَآءً وَلَا شُكُورًا
ayahEnglish: [Saying], "We feed you only for the face [i.e., approval] of Allāh. We wish not from you reward or gratitude.

targetTranslation: a reward (object of نُرِيدُ - we want)
ayahArabic: إِنَّمَا نُطْعِمُكُمْ لِوَجْهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَآءً وَلَا شُكُورًا
ayahEnglish: [Saying], "We feed you only for the face [i.e., approval] of Allāh. We wish not from you reward or gratitude.

targetTranslation: any gratitude (as the thing being rejected)
ayahArabic: إِنَّمَا نُطْعِمُكُمْ لِوَجْهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَآءً وَلَا شُكُورًا
ayahEnglish: [Saying], "We feed you only for the face [i.e., approval] of Allāh. We wish not from you reward or gratitude.

targetTranslation: we fear (in إِنَّا نَخَافُ - indeed we fear)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوْمًا عَبُوسًا قَمْطَرِيرًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We fear from our Lord a Day austere and distressful."

ayahArabic: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوْمًا عَبُوسًا قَمْطَرِيرًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We fear from our Lord a Day austere and distressful."

targetTranslation: a day (object of نَخَافُ - we fear)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوْمًا عَبُوسًا قَمْطَرِيرًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We fear from our Lord a Day austere and distressful."

targetTranslation: intensely frowning (describing يَوْمًا/day as the object)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوْمًا عَبُوسًا قَمْطَرِيرًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We fear from our Lord a Day austere and distressful."

ayahArabic: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوْمًا عَبُوسًا قَمْطَرِيرًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We fear from our Lord a Day austere and distressful."

ayahArabic: فَوَقَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ شَرَّ ذٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمِ وَلَقَّىٰهُمْ نَضْرَةً وَسُرُورًا
ayahEnglish: So Allāh will protect them from the evil of that Day and give them radiance and happiness

ayahArabic: فَوَقَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ شَرَّ ذٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمِ وَلَقَّىٰهُمْ نَضْرَةً وَسُرُورًا
ayahEnglish: So Allāh will protect them from the evil of that Day and give them radiance and happiness

ayahArabic: فَوَقَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ شَرَّ ذٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمِ وَلَقَّىٰهُمْ نَضْرَةً وَسُرُورًا
ayahEnglish: So Allāh will protect them from the evil of that Day and give them radiance and happiness

targetTranslation: with radiance (describing how Allah met them)
ayahArabic: فَوَقَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ شَرَّ ذٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمِ وَلَقَّىٰهُمْ نَضْرَةً وَسُرُورًا
ayahEnglish: So Allāh will protect them from the evil of that Day and give them radiance and happiness

targetTranslation: they endured patiently (reward mentioned in جَزَىٰهُم)
ayahArabic: وَجَزَىٰهُم بِمَا صَبَرُوا۟ جَنَّةً وَحَرِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And will reward them for what they patiently endured [with] a garden [in Paradise] and silk [garments].

ayahArabic: وَجَزَىٰهُم بِمَا صَبَرُوا۟ جَنَّةً وَحَرِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And will reward them for what they patiently endured [with] a garden [in Paradise] and silk [garments].

targetTranslation: those who are reclining comfortably (describes the people in Paradise)
ayahArabic: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ لَا يَرَوْنَ فِيهَا شَمْسًا وَلَا زَمْهَرِيرًا
ayahEnglish: [They will be] reclining therein on adorned couches. They will not see therein any [burning] sun or [freezing] cold.

targetTranslation: they see (referring to the people in Paradise)
ayahArabic: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ لَا يَرَوْنَ فِيهَا شَمْسًا وَلَا زَمْهَرِيرًا
ayahEnglish: [They will be] reclining therein on adorned couches. They will not see therein any [burning] sun or [freezing] cold.

ayahArabic: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ لَا يَرَوْنَ فِيهَا شَمْسًا وَلَا زَمْهَرِيرًا
ayahEnglish: [They will be] reclining therein on adorned couches. They will not see therein any [burning] sun or [freezing] cold.

ayahArabic: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ لَا يَرَوْنَ فِيهَا شَمْسًا وَلَا زَمْهَرِيرًا
ayahEnglish: [They will be] reclining therein on adorned couches. They will not see therein any [burning] sun or [freezing] cold.

ayahArabic: وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيْهِمْ ظِلٰلُهَا وَذُلِّلَتْ قُطُوفُهَا تَذْلِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And near above them are its shades, and its [fruit] to be picked will be lowered in compliance.

ayahArabic: وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيْهِمْ ظِلٰلُهَا وَذُلِّلَتْ قُطُوفُهَا تَذْلِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And near above them are its shades, and its [fruit] to be picked will be lowered in compliance.

ayahArabic: وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيْهِمْ ظِلٰلُهَا وَذُلِّلَتْ قُطُوفُهَا تَذْلِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And near above them are its shades, and its [fruit] to be picked will be lowered in compliance.

targetTranslation: of silver (describing the vessels in آنِيَةٍ)
ayahArabic: وَيُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِـَٔانِيَةٍ مِّن فِضَّةٍ وَأَكْوَابٍ كَانَتْ قَوَارِيرَا۠
ayahEnglish: And there will be circulated among them vessels of silver and cups having been [created] clear [as glass],

targetTranslation: it was (referring to the vessels of silver mentioned before)
ayahArabic: وَيُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِـَٔانِيَةٍ مِّن فِضَّةٍ وَأَكْوَابٍ كَانَتْ قَوَارِيرَا۠
ayahEnglish: And there will be circulated among them vessels of silver and cups having been [created] clear [as glass],

ayahArabic: وَيُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِـَٔانِيَةٍ مِّن فِضَّةٍ وَأَكْوَابٍ كَانَتْ قَوَارِيرَا۠
ayahEnglish: And there will be circulated among them vessels of silver and cups having been [created] clear [as glass],

ayahArabic: قَوَارِيرَا۟ مِن فِضَّةٍ قَدَّرُوهَا تَقْدِيرًا
ayahEnglish: Clear glasses [made] from silver of which they have determined the measure.

ayahArabic: قَوَارِيرَا۟ مِن فِضَّةٍ قَدَّرُوهَا تَقْدِيرًا
ayahEnglish: Clear glasses [made] from silver of which they have determined the measure.

targetTranslation: they measured it precisely (referring to the silver vessels mentioned before)
ayahArabic: قَوَارِيرَا۟ مِن فِضَّةٍ قَدَّرُوهَا تَقْدِيرًا
ayahEnglish: Clear glasses [made] from silver of which they have determined the measure.

targetTranslation: a precise measurement (object of قَدَّرُوهَا - they measured it)
ayahArabic: قَوَارِيرَا۟ مِن فِضَّةٍ قَدَّرُوهَا تَقْدِيرًا
ayahEnglish: Clear glasses [made] from silver of which they have determined the measure.

targetTranslation: a cup (object of يُسْقَوْنَ - they are given to drink)
ayahArabic: وَيُسْقَوْنَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And they will be given to drink a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of ginger

ayahArabic: وَيُسْقَوْنَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And they will be given to drink a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of ginger

targetTranslation: its mixture (referring to the drink's blend)
ayahArabic: وَيُسْقَوْنَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And they will be given to drink a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of ginger

targetTranslation: ginger (as the flavor mixed in their drink)
ayahArabic: وَيُسْقَوْنَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And they will be given to drink a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of ginger

targetTranslation: a spring (of water in Paradise named سَلْسَبِيلًا)
ayahArabic: عَيْنًا فِيهَا تُسَمَّىٰ سَلْسَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: [From] a fountain within it [i.e., Paradise] named Salsabeel.

targetTranslation: it is named (referring to عَيْنًا - a spring)
ayahArabic: عَيْنًا فِيهَا تُسَمَّىٰ سَلْسَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: [From] a fountain within it [i.e., Paradise] named Salsabeel.

targetTranslation: a sweet, easy-flowing spring (object of تُسَمَّىٰ/is named)
ayahArabic: عَيْنًا فِيهَا تُسَمَّىٰ سَلْسَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: [From] a fountain within it [i.e., Paradise] named Salsabeel.

ayahArabic: وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدٰنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ حَسِبْتَهُمْ لُؤْلُؤًا مَّنثُورًا
ayahEnglish: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal. When you see them, you would think them [as beautiful as] scattered pearls.

targetTranslation: eternal youth servants (who serve the people of Paradise)
ayahArabic: وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدٰنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ حَسِبْتَهُمْ لُؤْلُؤًا مَّنثُورًا
ayahEnglish: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal. When you see them, you would think them [as beautiful as] scattered pearls.

ayahArabic: وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدٰنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ حَسِبْتَهُمْ لُؤْلُؤًا مَّنثُورًا
ayahEnglish: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal. When you see them, you would think them [as beautiful as] scattered pearls.

targetTranslation: you saw them (referring to the eternal youths mentioned as وِلْدٰنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ)
ayahArabic: وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدٰنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ حَسِبْتَهُمْ لُؤْلُؤًا مَّنثُورًا
ayahEnglish: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal. When you see them, you would think them [as beautiful as] scattered pearls.

targetTranslation: you thought them (the youth) to be (scattered pearls)
ayahArabic: وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدٰنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ حَسِبْتَهُمْ لُؤْلُؤًا مَّنثُورًا
ayahEnglish: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal. When you see them, you would think them [as beautiful as] scattered pearls.

targetTranslation: pearls (as the object being seen by them)
ayahArabic: وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدٰنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ حَسِبْتَهُمْ لُؤْلُؤًا مَّنثُورًا
ayahEnglish: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal. When you see them, you would think them [as beautiful as] scattered pearls.

ayahArabic: وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدٰنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ حَسِبْتَهُمْ لُؤْلُؤًا مَّنثُورًا
ayahEnglish: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal. When you see them, you would think them [as beautiful as] scattered pearls.

targetTranslation: you saw (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ seeing paradise)
ayahArabic: وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيْتَ نَعِيمًا وَمُلْكًا كَبِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And when you look there [in Paradise], you will see pleasure and great dominion.

targetTranslation: there (in that place, referring to Paradise being described)
ayahArabic: وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيْتَ نَعِيمًا وَمُلْكًا كَبِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And when you look there [in Paradise], you will see pleasure and great dominion.

targetTranslation: you saw (addressing someone who will see نَعِيمًا وَمُلْكًا كَبِيرًا)
ayahArabic: وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيْتَ نَعِيمًا وَمُلْكًا كَبِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And when you look there [in Paradise], you will see pleasure and great dominion.

targetTranslation: great comfort/blessing (object of رَأَيْتَ - you saw)
ayahArabic: وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيْتَ نَعِيمًا وَمُلْكًا كَبِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And when you look there [in Paradise], you will see pleasure and great dominion.

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيْتَ نَعِيمًا وَمُلْكًا كَبِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And when you look there [in Paradise], you will see pleasure and great dominion.

ayahArabic: عٰلِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌ وَحُلُّوٓا۟ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ وَسَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًا طَهُورًا
ayahEnglish: Upon them [i.e., the inhabitants] will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.

ayahArabic: عٰلِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌ وَحُلُّوٓا۟ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ وَسَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًا طَهُورًا
ayahEnglish: Upon them [i.e., the inhabitants] will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.

ayahArabic: عٰلِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌ وَحُلُّوٓا۟ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ وَسَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًا طَهُورًا
ayahEnglish: Upon them [i.e., the inhabitants] will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.

ayahArabic: عٰلِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌ وَحُلُّوٓا۟ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ وَسَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًا طَهُورًا
ayahEnglish: Upon them [i.e., the inhabitants] will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.

ayahArabic: عٰلِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌ وَحُلُّوٓا۟ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ وَسَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًا طَهُورًا
ayahEnglish: Upon them [i.e., the inhabitants] will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.

ayahArabic: عٰلِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌ وَحُلُّوٓا۟ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ وَسَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًا طَهُورًا
ayahEnglish: Upon them [i.e., the inhabitants] will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.

ayahArabic: عٰلِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌ وَحُلُّوٓا۟ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ وَسَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًا طَهُورًا
ayahEnglish: Upon them [i.e., the inhabitants] will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.

ayahArabic: عٰلِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌ وَحُلُّوٓا۟ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ وَسَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًا طَهُورًا
ayahEnglish: Upon them [i.e., the inhabitants] will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.

ayahArabic: عٰلِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌ وَحُلُّوٓا۟ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ وَسَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًا طَهُورًا
ayahEnglish: Upon them [i.e., the inhabitants] will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَآءً وَكَانَ سَعْيُكُم مَّشْكُورًا
ayahEnglish: [And it will be said], "Indeed, this is for you a reward, and your effort has been appreciated."

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَآءً وَكَانَ سَعْيُكُم مَّشْكُورًا
ayahEnglish: [And it will be said], "Indeed, this is for you a reward, and your effort has been appreciated."

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَآءً وَكَانَ سَعْيُكُم مَّشْكُورًا
ayahEnglish: [And it will be said], "Indeed, this is for you a reward, and your effort has been appreciated."

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَآءً وَكَانَ سَعْيُكُم مَّشْكُورًا
ayahEnglish: [And it will be said], "Indeed, this is for you a reward, and your effort has been appreciated."

ayahArabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَنزِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, it is We who have sent down to you, [O Muḥammad], the Qur’ān progressively.

ayahArabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَنزِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, it is We who have sent down to you, [O Muḥammad], the Qur’ān progressively.

ayahArabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَنزِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, it is We who have sent down to you, [O Muḥammad], the Qur’ān progressively.

ayahArabic: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعْ مِنْهُمْ ءَاثِمًا أَوْ كَفُورًا
ayahEnglish: So be patient for the decision of your Lord and do not obey from among them a sinner or ungrateful [disbeliever].

targetTranslation: do not obey! (connected to وَلَا before it)
ayahArabic: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعْ مِنْهُمْ ءَاثِمًا أَوْ كَفُورًا
ayahEnglish: So be patient for the decision of your Lord and do not obey from among them a sinner or ungrateful [disbeliever].

targetTranslation: a sinful one (object of تُطِعْ - do not obey)
ayahArabic: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعْ مِنْهُمْ ءَاثِمًا أَوْ كَفُورًا
ayahEnglish: So be patient for the decision of your Lord and do not obey from among them a sinner or ungrateful [disbeliever].

targetTranslation: a very ungrateful person (object of تُطِعْ - do not obey)
ayahArabic: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعْ مِنْهُمْ ءَاثِمًا أَوْ كَفُورًا
ayahEnglish: So be patient for the decision of your Lord and do not obey from among them a sinner or ungrateful [disbeliever].

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And mention the name of your Lord [in prayer] morning and evening

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And mention the name of your Lord [in prayer] morning and evening

targetTranslation: in the early morning (connected to وَأَصِيلًا - and in the evening)
ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And mention the name of your Lord [in prayer] morning and evening

ayahArabic: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَٱسْجُدْ لَهُۥ وَسَبِّحْهُ لَيْلًا طَوِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And during the night prostrate to Him and exalt [i.e., praise] Him a long [part of the] night.

targetTranslation: for a long time (describes سَبِّحْهُ - glorify Him)
ayahArabic: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَٱسْجُدْ لَهُۥ وَسَبِّحْهُ لَيْلًا طَوِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And during the night prostrate to Him and exalt [i.e., praise] Him a long [part of the] night.

targetTranslation: they love intensely (referring to the disbelievers in هٰٓؤُلَآءِ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ يُحِبُّونَ ٱلْعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَآءَهُمْ يَوْمًا ثَقِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, these [disbelievers] love the immediate and leave behind them a grave Day.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ يُحِبُّونَ ٱلْعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَآءَهُمْ يَوْمًا ثَقِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, these [disbelievers] love the immediate and leave behind them a grave Day.

targetTranslation: a day (object of يَذَرُونَ - they leave)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ يُحِبُّونَ ٱلْعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَآءَهُمْ يَوْمًا ثَقِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, these [disbelievers] love the immediate and leave behind them a grave Day.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ يُحِبُّونَ ٱلْعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَآءَهُمْ يَوْمًا ثَقِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, these [disbelievers] love the immediate and leave behind them a grave Day.

targetTranslation: indeed we (subject of خَلَقْنٰهُمْ/we created them)
ayahArabic: نَّحْنُ خَلَقْنٰهُمْ وَشَدَدْنَآ أَسْرَهُمْ وَإِذَا شِئْنَا بَدَّلْنَآ أَمْثٰلَهُمْ تَبْدِيلًا
ayahEnglish: We have created them and strengthened their forms, and when We will, We can change their likenesses with [complete] alteration.

ayahArabic: نَّحْنُ خَلَقْنٰهُمْ وَشَدَدْنَآ أَسْرَهُمْ وَإِذَا شِئْنَا بَدَّلْنَآ أَمْثٰلَهُمْ تَبْدِيلًا
ayahEnglish: We have created them and strengthened their forms, and when We will, We can change their likenesses with [complete] alteration.

ayahArabic: نَّحْنُ خَلَقْنٰهُمْ وَشَدَدْنَآ أَسْرَهُمْ وَإِذَا شِئْنَا بَدَّلْنَآ أَمْثٰلَهُمْ تَبْدِيلًا
ayahEnglish: We have created them and strengthened their forms, and when We will, We can change their likenesses with [complete] alteration.

ayahArabic: نَّحْنُ خَلَقْنٰهُمْ وَشَدَدْنَآ أَسْرَهُمْ وَإِذَا شِئْنَا بَدَّلْنَآ أَمْثٰلَهُمْ تَبْدِيلًا
ayahEnglish: We have created them and strengthened their forms, and when We will, We can change their likenesses with [complete] alteration.

ayahArabic: نَّحْنُ خَلَقْنٰهُمْ وَشَدَدْنَآ أَسْرَهُمْ وَإِذَا شِئْنَا بَدَّلْنَآ أَمْثٰلَهُمْ تَبْدِيلًا
ayahEnglish: We have created them and strengthened their forms, and when We will, We can change their likenesses with [complete] alteration.

ayahArabic: نَّحْنُ خَلَقْنٰهُمْ وَشَدَدْنَآ أَسْرَهُمْ وَإِذَا شِئْنَا بَدَّلْنَآ أَمْثٰلَهُمْ تَبْدِيلًا
ayahEnglish: We have created them and strengthened their forms, and when We will, We can change their likenesses with [complete] alteration.

targetTranslation: a complete change/replacement (emphasizing the action of بَدَّلْنَا)
ayahArabic: نَّحْنُ خَلَقْنٰهُمْ وَشَدَدْنَآ أَسْرَهُمْ وَإِذَا شِئْنَا بَدَّلْنَآ أَمْثٰلَهُمْ تَبْدِيلًا
ayahEnglish: We have created them and strengthened their forms, and when We will, We can change their likenesses with [complete] alteration.

targetTranslation: a reminder (that is being described in هٰذِهِۦ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, this is a reminder, so he who wills may take to his Lord a way.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, this is a reminder, so he who wills may take to his Lord a way.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, this is a reminder, so he who wills may take to his Lord a way.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, this is a reminder, so he who wills may take to his Lord a way.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, this is a reminder, so he who wills may take to his Lord a way.

targetTranslation: you all want/wish (connected to إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ - except that Allah wills)
ayahArabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا
ayahEnglish: And you do not will except that Allāh wills. Indeed, Allāh is ever Knowing and Wise.

targetTranslation: he wills/wishes (in relation to Allah's will)
ayahArabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا
ayahEnglish: And you do not will except that Allāh wills. Indeed, Allāh is ever Knowing and Wise.

ayahArabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا
ayahEnglish: And you do not will except that Allāh wills. Indeed, Allāh is ever Knowing and Wise.

targetTranslation: Allah (as the object of يَشَآءَ - that which Allah wills)
ayahArabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا
ayahEnglish: And you do not will except that Allāh wills. Indeed, Allāh is ever Knowing and Wise.

targetTranslation: he was (describing Allah's attributes عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا)
ayahArabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا
ayahEnglish: And you do not will except that Allāh wills. Indeed, Allāh is ever Knowing and Wise.

ayahArabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا
ayahEnglish: And you do not will except that Allāh wills. Indeed, Allāh is ever Knowing and Wise.

ayahArabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا
ayahEnglish: And you do not will except that Allāh wills. Indeed, Allāh is ever Knowing and Wise.

targetTranslation: he causes to enter (subject of يَشَآءُ)
ayahArabic: يُدْخِلُ مَن يَشَآءُ فِى رَحْمَتِهِۦ وَٱلظَّالِمِينَ أَعَدَّ لَهُمْ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًۢا
ayahEnglish: He admits whom He wills into His mercy; but the wrongdoers - He has prepared for them a painful punishment.

ayahArabic: يُدْخِلُ مَن يَشَآءُ فِى رَحْمَتِهِۦ وَٱلظَّالِمِينَ أَعَدَّ لَهُمْ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًۢا
ayahEnglish: He admits whom He wills into His mercy; but the wrongdoers - He has prepared for them a painful punishment.

targetTranslation: he wants/wishes (subject of يُدْخِلُ - he admits)
ayahArabic: يُدْخِلُ مَن يَشَآءُ فِى رَحْمَتِهِۦ وَٱلظَّالِمِينَ أَعَدَّ لَهُمْ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًۢا
ayahEnglish: He admits whom He wills into His mercy; but the wrongdoers - He has prepared for them a painful punishment.

ayahEnglish: He admits whom He wills into His mercy; but the wrongdoers - He has prepared for them a painful punishment.
